task_updates.executor_notes: Wrote `supabase/migrations/20260424000001_schedule_discord_media_importer.sql` to schedule `discord-media-importer` every 2 minutes via `net.http_post(...)` with `Authorization: Bearer ' || COALESCE(internal.get_service_role_key(), '')`, and documented the required operator seed command for `internal.secrets` in the migration header. Repository verification passed: the new file contains the expected `discord-media-importer` schedule, `net.http_post`, and `internal.get_service_role_key()` call, and the existing promoter migration still contains the 10-minute direct-SQL schedule. Linked-project verification is still blocked: `supabase_migrations.schema_migrations` reports both `20260424000000` and `20260424000001` as not applied, and `cron.job` currently reports `promoter_job_present=false` and `importer_job_present=false`, so the two schedules cannot yet be confirmed in pg_cron and the secret has not been seeded there. Full-suite regression check rerun: `pytest --tb=no -q --no-header` finished with the same 7 pre-existing failures (`brain-of-bndc/tests/test_payment_cog_split.py::test_split_cogs_preserve_view_registration_and_cap_breach_routing`, `tools/tests/test_arrange.py::ArrangeTest::test_cli_fills_hash_envelope_from_file_bytes`, `tools/tests/test_arrange.py::ArrangeTest::test_payload_passes_validate_arrangement`, `tools/tests/test_audio_render.py::AudioRenderTest::test_rendered_mp4_contains_audio_stream`, `tools/tests/test_hype_cut_invariants.py::test_hype_cut_invariants_on_discovered_run_dirs`, `tools/tests/test_multitrack_cut.py::MultitrackCutTest::test_compile_arrangement_plan_rejects_short_overlay`, `tools/tests/test_schema_contract.py::SchemaContractTest::test_generator_byte_stability`).

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Partially. The importer cron is now defined in `supabase/migrations/20260424000001_schedule_discord_media_importer.sql` as a 2-minute `net.http_post(...)` call with `Authorization` built from `internal.get_service_role_key()`, and the operator-seed `INSERT INTO internal.secrets ...` command is documented in the migration header. The secret has not been seeded on the linked project, and pg_cron does not yet show either Discord schedule there because migration versions `20260424000000` and `20260424000001` are still unapplied (`promoter_job_present=false`, `importer_job_present=false`).
